zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Somerville於大約1312年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓時，她的父親Philip Somerville35歲，母親Margaret de Pype38歲。她於1331年與John Stafford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾桑登享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Somerville于大约1312年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓时，她的父亲Philip Somerville35岁，母亲Margaret de Pype38岁。她于1331年与John Stafford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾桑登享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Somerville was born about 1312, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, her father, Philip Somerville, was 35 and her mother, Margaret de Pype, was 38. She married John Stafford in 1331. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1349, in Sandon, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Somerville est née environ 1312, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Somerville, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Pype, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé John Stafford en 1331. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1349, à Sandon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Somerville um 1312 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Somerville 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Pype 38. Sie hat 1331 John Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1349 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Sandon, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Somerville è nata il circa 1312 nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Philip Somerville, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Pype, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato John Stafford nel 1331. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1349, nel Sandon, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Somervilleが約1312年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで生まれた時，父Philip Somervilleは35歳，母Margaret de Pypeは38歳であった。1331年にJohn Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアサンドンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Somerville(이)가 대략 1312년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Somerville(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Pype(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1331년 John Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 샌던에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Somerville nasceu aproximadamente 1312, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Somerville, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Pype, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stafford em 1331. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1349, em Sandon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Somerville родилась около 1312 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Somerville было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Pype, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stafford в 1331 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1349 г. в местности сэндон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Somerville nació aproximadamente 1312, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Somerville, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret de Pype, tenía 38 años. Se casó con John Stafford en 1331. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1349, en Sandon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
